title: taraxacum crepidiforme
intro: Taraxacum crepidiforme, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion genus. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum crepidiforme include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Taraxacum crepidiforme can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
